name: Roasted Game Hens Stuffed Under the Skin With
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Place the ricotta in a fine sieve and drain for 30 minutes.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the drained ricotta, Parmesan, egg yolk, herbs, and lemon zest. Put the garlic clove through a garlic press and into the ricotta. Mix well, adding salt and pepper to taste.
4. Rinse the game hens and pat them dry.
5. Season the cavities with salt and pepper and place a quarter lemon and a quarter onion in each cavity.
6. Loosen the skin on the breasts by sliding your fingers under the skin, being careful not to pierce it.
7. Spoon the ricotta mixture under the skin (about 4 tablespoons of stuffing per bird).
8. Truss the birds.
9. Place the birds, breast side up, in a shallow roasting pan. Pour the white wine into the pan.
10. Bake for 1 hour, or until the juices run clear when the hen is pierced in the thickest part of the thigh.
11. Remove from the oven and serve with the pan juices spooned over the hens.
Yield: 6 servings
